## Observation

This lesson was captured but on review was found to be too narrowly scoped to be useful.

## Why it matters

Not all captured lessons survive review; the discard path clears noise from the inbox.

## How to apply

When a lesson lacks a generalizable insight, discard with reason rather than silently deleting.
